title: silene vulgaris subsp. ovalifolia
intro: Silene vulgaris subsp. ovalifolia, also known as white campion, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of silene vulgaris subsp. ovalifolia include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of silene vulgaris subsp. ovalifolia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
